title: Skillnet Offshore Wind Academy — National Platform Launch
description: Join us for the national launch of Ireland's Offshore Wind Career Pathway Platform. Hear from industry leaders, policy makers, and education providers about Ireland's offshore wind future.

title: Careers in Offshore Wind: Where to Start
description: An introductory webinar for anyone curious about careers in offshore wind energy. Learn about entry points, training pathways, and what a typical career looks like.

title: Employer Roundtable: Building Your OWE Workforce
description: A facilitated discussion for employers on workforce planning, upskilling strategies, and accessing Skillnet Ireland supports for OWE training.

title: Offshore Wind Skills Roadshow — Cork
description: Part of a national roadshow series bringing offshore wind career information directly to communities. Meet training providers, hear from technicians, and explore career pathways.

title: Research Symposium: OWE Skills & Workforce Development
description: Academic and industry researchers present the latest findings on skills gaps, workforce trends, and training effectiveness in offshore wind energy.

title: GWO Certification: What You Need to Know
description: A free information session explaining GWO (Global Wind Organisation) safety certifications — what they are, why you need them, and where to get trained in Ireland.
